whatWasImplemented: src/components/legal/LegalFooter.tsx — shared footer with links to /privacy, /terms, /dpa + mailto:brandon@rubycrawl.app. Exports LEGAL_CONTACT_EMAIL constant so page bodies interpolate the same address.

src/app/privacy/page.tsx — 7-section Privacy Policy (what we collect / processors / use / retention / rights / contact). Lists all seven processors (Supabase, OpenAI, Firecrawl, Stripe, Upstash, Resend, Sentry) as required by contract.
src/app/terms/page.tsx — rewrote previous stub. 7 sections covering scope, acceptable use, billing, content rights, warranties, termination, contact. Cross-links to /privacy for deletion behavior.

src/app/dpa/page.tsx — GDPR Art. 28 Data Processing Addendum. 7 sections: roles, scope, security measures, authorised sub-processors (all 7 named), international transfers, data-subject requests, breach notification.
src/__tests__/legal-pages.test.ts — 11 tests: each route renders >1KB of markup; footer links to the other two; privacy + DPA list every processor; contact email present on all three.
whatWasLeftUndone: Brandon's review of the final legal text before general-availability launch. Current copy is faithful to the product's actual processor topology but is not counsel-reviewed.
Footer on marketing / landing page does not yet link to /privacy + /terms + /dpa. The existing landing (src/app/landing.tsx) is untouched in this feature — follow-on.
discoveredIssues: The pre-existing /terms stub was only 400 bytes and would have failed VAL-HARD-004. M8F3's rewrite brings it past the 1KB threshold and matches the new privacy/DPA layout.
No shared legal layout yet — each page mounts its own <main> + LegalFooter. Fine for three static routes; extract a layout.tsx if we add more.

verification.testsRun: pnpm vitest run — 587 passing / 1 skipped / 70 files (+11 legal-pages tests).

manualChecks.expected: > 1024 chars, contains all 7 processors, footer links to /terms + /dpa, contact email shown
> 1024 chars, footer links to /privacy + /dpa, contact email shown
> 1024 chars, footer links to /privacy + /terms, contact email shown, all 7 processors listed
